text.title: Program Weekly Note Template Core Rules

rule.statement: Every note MUST start with a one-sentence headline; longer headlines are rejected.
rule.rationale: Sponsors read only the headline; longer destroys signal.

rule.statement: Every workstream progress line MUST cite an evidence link (PR, dashboard, artefact); evidence-less progress is rejected.
rule.rationale: Without evidence, progress claims drift toward optimism.

rule.statement: The risks section MUST list exactly the 3 risks that moved most this week (score delta or status change); listing all risks is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Long risk lists are skimmed; top-3 forces prioritisation.

rule.statement: Sponsor asks MUST be numbered + decision-shaped (one decision per ask); free-text 'awareness items' belong elsewhere.
rule.rationale: Numbered asks enable async sponsor reply with item references.

rule.statement: Every note MUST include a last-week outcomes table with status per prior ask/decision.
rule.rationale: Without closure-loop, asks drift; sponsors lose trust in the note.
